title: Write your 1-sentence pitch
description: Distill what you create and who it's for into one clear sentence.
completion_prompt: Paste your pitch below

title: Define your brand name
description: Choose a name that reflects your content style and is easy to remember.
completion_prompt: What's your brand name?

title: Write your bio
description: Write a short bio (2–3 sentences) that you can use across platforms.
completion_prompt: Paste your bio below

title: Define your content niche
description: Narrow down the specific audience and topic you create for.
completion_prompt: Describe your niche in one sentence

title: Link your social profile
description: Add the link to your main social platform where you post content.
completion_prompt: Paste your profile URL

title: Set up a pricing page
description: Define what you charge for your services, products, or collaborations.
completion_prompt: Describe your pricing or paste a link to your pricing page

title: Register your domain via GoDaddy
description: Secure your brand's home on the web. Register your .com (or your preferred TLD).
completion_prompt: What domain did you register?

title: Create a shareable media kit
description: Build a one-page overview of your audience, stats, and collaboration offerings.
completion_prompt: Paste a link to your media kit or describe what's in it

title: Define your first digital product or offer
description: Create a specific, sellable offering — a preset pack, course, template, or 1:1 session.
completion_prompt: Describe your product or offer

title: Set up a payment method
description: Connect a payment processor (Stripe, PayPal, etc.) so you can get paid.
completion_prompt: Which payment method did you set up?

title: Publish your first offer
description: Make your product or service publicly available and shareable.
completion_prompt: Paste the link to your live offer

title: Log your first revenue
description: Record any amount earned from your creator business, however small.
completion_prompt: How much did you earn and from what?

title: Discover 5 funding opportunities
description: Use the Funding Engine to find 5 grants, programs, or funds you're eligible for.
completion_prompt: List the 5 opportunities you found

title: Complete your funding eligibility profile
description: Fill in your location, creator type, revenue range, and business age to unlock matched funding.
completion_prompt: Confirm your profile is complete

title: Submit your first grant application
description: Apply to one of the funding opportunities matched to your profile.
completion_prompt: Which grant did you apply to?

title: Set up a professional email via GoDaddy
description: Get a branded email address (you@yourbrand.com) through GoDaddy Workspace Email.
completion_prompt: What's your new professional email address?

title: Fill all business profile fields
description: Complete your bio, pitch, revenue goal, and domain in your CreatorLevel profile.
completion_prompt: Confirm all fields are filled

title: Generate your AI pitch deck
description: Use the Claude-powered pitch deck generator to create a one-pager from your profile.
completion_prompt: Confirm your pitch deck has been generated

title: Publish a polished media kit
description: Upgrade your media kit with updated stats, a headshot, and brand story.
completion_prompt: Paste a link to your updated media kit

title: Define your revenue and funding goal
description: Set a specific 12-month revenue target and the funding amount you're seeking.
completion_prompt: What is your revenue goal and funding ask?

title: Generate your investor pitch deck
description: Create a full investor-facing pitch with traction, financials, and your ask.
completion_prompt: Confirm your investor pitch deck is ready

title: Submit an accelerator application
description: Apply to a creator-focused accelerator or incubator program.
completion_prompt: Which accelerator did you apply to?

title: Register your LLC via GoDaddy
description: Make your business official. Use GoDaddy Airo to form an LLC in minutes — protecting your personal assets and making your brand investor-ready. Visit godaddy.com/airo/register-llc to get started.
completion_prompt: Confirm your LLC has been registered and share your business name
